programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College
programme.desc: College lacrosse player Yeardley Love is found dead in her college apartment. But the community is left stunned when cops arrest a member of a wealthy, prominent family.

programme.title: Expedition X: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica head to Lake Lanier, the deadliest lake in America, to uncover rumors of drownings and ghostly encounters.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Expedition X: Uncovered: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica face camera issues and even emotional breakdowns while attempting to explain unusual occurrences on the long-avoided Island of the Dolls.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Super Josh

programme.title: Expedition X: Ghosts in the Swamp
programme.desc: Terrifying apparitions in a Texas swamp lead Josh Gates to send his team to the notorious Big Thicket. The area is crawling with venomous snakes but what really frightens Phil and Jess are mysterious Ghost Lights that have haunted locals for generations.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Super Josh
programme.desc: Josh Gates celebrates all things superhero with The Mandalorian's Katee Sackoff, 'Spiderman' and 'True Blood' star Joe Mangainello, and Famke Janssen of 'X-Men.' Plus, Josh sees if he has superpowers when he rumbles on the set of Battlebots.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911
programme.desc: Kevin poses as an interviewer to gain access to a Westwind jet, Ken and Danny valet a car to get the keys to a Cessna CJ3, and Mike repos an air ambulance, but not before he rescues their final lifesaving mission.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Desperado Tournament

programme.title: BattleBots: USA vs the World
programme.desc: In a special tournament, Battlebots Team USA takes on bots from around the world in an international showdown of combat robotics.

programme.title: BattleBots: It's Tournament Time
programme.desc: The Sweet 16 round kicks off with an epic night of fights featuring Tombstone, Minotaur, and Lock-Jaw, as the group of elite bots begin the battle to become the 2018 BattleBots World Champion.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Tournament
programme.desc: The tournament begins with an epic night of smackdowns and legendary upsets as eight world-class bots go head-to-head to earn a place in the final four of the BattleBots World Championship.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Last Bot Standing
programme.desc: It's championship night and just four bots remain to face off in the ultimate battles to decide the 2018 BattleBots World Champion.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley R.'s Story
programme.desc: At 670 pounds Ashley must live in her parents' home with her husband. Desperate to save her life and her marriage, she decides it's time for a drastic change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brandi and Kandi's Story
programme.desc: Twins Kandi and Brandi have a combined weight totaling over 1100lbs. These inseparable twins fear losing each other to obesity, so they make a change together.

programme.desc: After successful sleeve gastrectomy procedures, the Dreier twins collectively lost more than 400 lbs and are working toward skin surgeries when a major life event disrupts their world and threatens the security they thought they had.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Antisocial Network

programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mysteries in the Moose State
programme.desc: Some of the wardens enter the annual moose-hunting lottery. Meanwhile, Craven tracks down the mythical Main mountain lion and the wardens try to find an elderly man lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Cliffs of Peril
programme.desc: On Cannon Cliffs, a heroic helicopter rescue mission ensues to save an injured rock climber, while Officer Crouse questions an aggressive OHRV rider. Officer MacFazden handles a suspicious deer kill, and a group of ATV speedsters are caught.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett investigate a man raising alligators in the attic of his home. As night falls over the White Mountains, Officers Glenn Lucas and Eric Fluette ascend into the darkness to rescue a lost group of hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Lies and Lizards
programme.desc: New Hampshire conservation officers deal with problems involving all creatures great and small, but an aggressive and angry lizard on the loose is certainly an uncommon distress call in the woods of the northeast.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Occupational Hazards
programme.desc: Deep in the Maine woods, danger lurks behind every tree for the game wardens. Warden Herring comes across a sprawling illegal encampment on private property. Warden Stevens discovers three marijuana grows and must seize dozens of plants.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In a Hot Second
programme.desc: On land and water, it's the wardens' job to keep people safe. Warden McBrine coordinates a LifeFlight helicopter for the victim of a serious car crash. Warden Buuck spreads the word on boating safety.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Lights! Croc! Action!
programme.desc: Get a behind the scenes look at Steve and Terri's new movie as they try to act.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: They Shoot Crocodiles Don't They
programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi swim with dolphins, seals and sharks. Steve dives to the ancient wreck of the Batavia and explores a habitat of Tamar wallabies and pythons.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Legacy Continues
programme.desc: After months of training, Robert steps into his father's shoes to feed Graham, Australia Zoo's most notorious crocodile, solo, in front of the entire Crocoseum. Bindi witnesses one of nature's rarest events: Cedar the Koala has given birth to twins.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Soul Train Awards

programme.title: Dateline: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: An ex-Navy man marries the love of his life. Five months later his new bride finds him dead on their bedroom floor. With no apparent cause of death, family and authorities are left puzzled.

programme.title: Dateline: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When a successful luxury car dealer is murdered in his sleep, detectives soon focus in on one of the victim’s many lovers. But with little hard evidence to go on, the investigation stalls – until a year later.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: She Said...
programme.desc: When a terrified sex worker asks Detective Penny Hart for help, she knows it must be serious. Things quickly intensify when the same frightened informant goes missing and is feared to be dead.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Out of Lies
programme.desc: Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef pushes his investigative creativity to the limit as he tries to solve the vicious murder of an innocent grandmother.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Last Move
programme.desc: When 72 year-old Bruce Firman is found brutally murdered in his home, Detective Keri Harrison must discover who would want this kind, elderly man dead.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: No Breathing Room
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report. After moving in they discover problems that made parts of the house off limits.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Quonset Hut to Guest House
programme.desc: The guys use reclaimed materials to create bright and functional guest quarters in the dark, unsafe storage space of a World War II Quonset hut. The sleeping area features custom beds, and the kitchen is build out with butcher block countertops.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts the day right at the Shasta District Fair in Anderson, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deliciously Doughy

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac

programme.title: Shameless: A Yurt of One's Own

programme.title: Shameless: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sean officially moves into the Gallagher house as Fiona, intent on getting her marriage right this time, sets out to plan a traditional wedding. Meanwhile, Kev is not happy about V and Svetlana's pending green card marriage and seeks a way around it.

programme.title: Shameless: Sleep No More

programme.title: Shameless: Familia Supra Gallegorious Omnia!

programme.title: Movie: Hitch

programme.title: Movie: Home for the Holidays

programme.desc: Seven years after becoming artificially inseminated, a woman learns that her best friend switched the donor sample with his own.

programme.title: Shameless: Swipe, F**k, Leave

programme.title: Shameless: Home Sweet Homeless Shelter
programme.desc: Kevin, Veronica and Svetlana start a topless maid service. At the shelter, meanwhile, Frank makes new friends to replace his old family -- leading them to a for-sale house converted into the Gallagher Home for the Homeless.

programme.title: Shameless: I Am a Storm
programme.desc: Frank worries that he and his new family will lose their Home for the Homeless shelter, so he plans a little goodwill for the neighborhood. Meanwhile, Fiona drums up business by throwing a speakeasy party at Patsy's Pies.

programme.title: Shameless: Own Your Sh*t
programme.desc: Frank learns that a billionaire philanthropist has bought the homeless shelter and he and his clan can stay. Meanwhile, Fiona gets smart financial advice from a Tinder hookup as Ian struggles with his feelings for Trevor.

programme.title: Shameless: The Defenestration of Frank
programme.desc: Fiona sees opportunity in a laundromat for sale and decides to invest. Frank revels in the good fortune of his scam, but the troops catch a whiff of foul play. Meanwhile, Kev and V discover a shocking secret about Svetlana's father.

programme.title: Shameless: You'll Never Ever Get a Chicken in Your Whole Entire Life

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a meal made entirely out of produce from Murr's backyard. Plus, Wayne Brady, the greatest improviser of all time, joins the conversation.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent
programme.desc: The NSA Interns uncover insane videos, including a man who tests homemade chloroform on himself and a massive wedding fail. Plus, the interns investigate a rogue agent's social media.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sun Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Learn how the crew created a fake yearbook for one of the challenges and how the audio team prepares for when Joe takes his shirt off.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.desc: Barry begs Murray to get a dog, and when they finally do, Barry is disappointed to find the dog would rather spend more time with Murray than with him. Meanwhile, Erica and Lainey plan a girls-only sleepover without Beverly.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sixty Foot Monster
programme.desc: As arctic superstorm Elsa intensifies, a rare forecast warns of isolated waves of unusual size. Trapped in the crab-rich northern grounds, the Cornelia Marie, Wizard and Southern Wind haul pots as big as the waves, until one boat faces a 60 foot monster.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crane Wreck
programme.desc: In storm-driven seas, Cornelia Marie's crane goes off the rails, smashing Josh and Casey's wheelhouse and injuring deckhand Taylor. Sig risks navigating a rocky passage in treacherous conditions, and the Wizard crew face a rogue wave without warning.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Devil's Cut
programme.desc: Deckhands pay in blood as captains make up for time lost to the storm. On the Cornelia Marie Josh takes the wheel as Casey conducts surgery at sea. Brenna A tests the mettle of a former Marine. And a call from home has Sig facing a worst case scenario.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unbreakable
programme.desc: The fleet battles a freight train of back to back storms. Sig's crew pays a price for stuffed pots, while Harley risks gear on an elusive hoard under the ice. Freddy attempts self-surgery on the Wizard, and the Summer Bay crew gets news on Nick's future.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: Monte returns to co-captain the Wizard just as a freight train of storms slams the fleet from the south. Jake battles the risk of hauling pots in 30 foot seas to return to his family. Wild Bill drives farther north into the icy Arctic than any other boat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: As crab turn elusive, veterans Sig Hansen and 'Harley' Davidson form an unlikely alliance, but trust doesn't come easy for old school captains. Freddy pays a price for Keith's decision to haul in intense seas, and Jake tempts fate to become a boat owner.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dark Ship
programme.desc: As smoke fills the Wizard, the Colburns face a dark ship nightmare. Towering breakers shatter Jake's steel anchor forcing him to fight to avoid the rocks of St. Paul Island. Battered by relentless seas Sig turns to family to fill the Northwestern's tanks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Time and Tide Wait for No Man
programme.desc: The bone-breaking winter unleashes its fury on the Summer Bay. A rookie mistake leaves Captain Bill short a hand. Jake hits the jackpot at sea, but forces on land cost him dearly. There's hell to pay when Sean discovers the fatal flaw in his crab count.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Never Say Die
programme.desc: The crew of the Steve Irwin are plunged into their most violent battle yet.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Counterstrike
programme.desc: When a massive target is detected, the Sea Shepherd sends out their new helicopter pilot to ID the mystery vessel.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Target Acquired
programme.desc: After months of frustration, Sea Shepherd finally finds their target, the Nisshin Maru.

programme.title: Whale Wars: A Commander Rises
programme.desc: Watson is forced to step down as the Sea Shepherds' leader just as their fledging armada leaves for the Southern Ocean. Everyone is rattled and wonders if the organization itself can succeed without his presence.

programme.title: Whale Wars: The Devil's Den
programme.desc: Although its Sea Shepherd's 10th anti-whaling campaign in the Antarctic, it is their first without Captain Paul Watson. Peter Hammarstedt is taking over as campaign leader.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Fight to the Death
programme.desc: Rookie leader Peter Hamarstedt struggles as crew members fail to obey his orders with a brutal storm on the way. The campaign could be in jeopardy as Japanese harpoon ships are looming.

programme.title: Whale Wars: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: When the Bob Barker collides with a Japanese harpoon ship, Sea Shepherd is left to track the whaling fleet by helicopter. Hope begins to fade when blizzard conditions block communication and freezes the instruments.

programme.title: River Monsters: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: Locals call it the lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole. Jeremy has hunted the legendary Amazon giant for years and this time he's not coming back without the single colossal specimen.

programme.title: River Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy's cases usually involve freshwater culprits, but with multiple reports of a deep water serial killer in Mexico's 'Sea of Cortez', he must step out of his comfort zone and into unchartered depths in search of the red devil.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Professor Klump takes a revolutionary potion that makes him shed some of his 400 pounds.

programme.title: Movie: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps

programme.desc: Martin tries to spend more time with Gina to help their relationship, but Gina is busy.

programme.desc: Cleveland and his friends prepare to enter Stoolbend's annual boat race as a team, but when Cleveland's celebrity idol moves to town, Cleveland makes it a priority to befriend him.

programme.desc: Martin and Gina move back in together, but there are too many belongings to fit.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets Committed
programme.desc: The Banks family returns to their former neighbourhood to help their old friends rebuild.

programme.title: Black-ish: God
programme.desc: When Dre discovers that Zoey is questioning her belief in God, he undergoes a crisis of faith and leans on family members and coworkers for their input. Meanwhile, Bow's brother Johan comes to stay with the Johnsons.

programme.title: Black-ish: 40 Acres and a Vote
programme.desc: With Obama leaving office and the upcoming election, Dre finds a new candidate to believe in: Junior. Junior is running for class president and is overqualified for the job, but he just can't seem to connect with his fellow classmates.

programme.desc: When Martin wins the lottery, he spends a lot of the money before claiming his prize.

programme.title: Martin: Get a Job
programme.desc: Martin and Gina go undercover to try and discover what Tommy does for a living.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine

programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.desc: Nikki and her family compete on a new TV game show where contestants spill family secrets.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New

programme.title: Mom: Clumsy Monkeys and a Tilted Uterus
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to make sure everything goes smoothly when Violet finds the perfect couple to adopt her baby.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crazy Mom
programme.desc: When Dre agrees to take over Rainbow's 'mom' duties for a week, the overwhelming praise he gets from everyone at his kids’ school goes to his head. He soon finds himself pushing the envelope to outdo everyone, even the school's 'crazy mom.'

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes

programme.desc: Logan, whose power to self-heal is dwindling, takes care of Professor X in hiding. A young girl, hunted by a shadowy corporation for her connection to Logan, finds them. As the three fight to escape, Logan must decide how to use his remaining powers.

programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a peaceful cul-de-sac where all the neighbours got along until they each got a dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Caged Heat
programme.desc: When twins Tiffany and Krystle got their Chihuahua/Pomeranian mix Tigger, things were instantly twice as complicated. Cesar comes in to catch this Tigger by the tail.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Gladiator
programme.desc: Wheaten terrier mix, Tillie, has grown so attached to her owner she wont leave his side and 3-year-old shar-pei, Leo, killed a neighbors Maltese.

programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: E-I-E-I-Pol
programme.desc: Spring showers bring May flowers and a rather painful situation for one unlucky patient.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Arctic Super Moon
programme.desc: Alaskans scurry to find precious resources in a constantly changing winter landscape.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter's Grip
programme.desc: At the apex of winter, a lack of snowfall in the Arctic makes basic tasks more difficult.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: When Animals Take Over
programme.desc: Eerie ghost towns, sinister industrial complexes, and mysterious ruins were once the domain of humans, but when people leave these places, their silence is filled by wild beasts seizing control of the land they once ruled.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: When Animals Take Over
programme.desc: Eerie ghost towns, sinister industrial complexes, and mysterious ruins were once the domain of humans, but when people leave these places, their silence is filled by wild beasts seizing control of the land they once ruled.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified: Secrets of a Mastermind
programme.desc: Tesla's infamous death ray might shed new information about his suspicious death, and a team of experts attempt to build an exact replica of the mysterious superweapon.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified: Curse of the Forbidden Lab
programme.desc: Aron and his team are hard at work on their reconstruction of Tesla's 'Death Ray'. Meanwhile Jack and Cameron travel to Colorado Springs to search for the former site of Tesla's experimental laboratory, in hopes of finding more clues about the weapon.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified: Hunting a Cover-Up
programme.desc: Following Aron's successful test of his Death Ray, proving the revolutionary weapon could be real, Jack shifts his focus to Nikola Tesla's potential murder. The first suspect sends Jack and Cameron overseas to Serbia to look for clues.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified: Hitler's Deadly Plot
programme.desc: The investigation of Tesla's suspicious death and missing documents continues. The team travels to Serbia, Tesla's homeland, and discovers never before seen documents drawn by Tesla himself.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified: FBI's Secret Scheme
programme.desc: Declassified documents shed a new light on the FBI's involvement in Nikola Tesla's mysterious death.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Bomb in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A car explosion outside a Tucson country club leaves a business tycoon dead. Detectives determine the killer detonated the homemade bomb at close range, and the list of suspects soon includes mobsters, defrauded investors, and the victim's ex-wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Bomb in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A car explosion outside a Tucson country club leaves a business tycoon dead. Detectives determine the killer detonated the homemade bomb at close range, and the list of suspects soon includes mobsters, defrauded investors, and the victim's ex-wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Terror grips Wylie, Texas on Friday the 13th, when young mother and teacher Betty Gore is hacked to death with an axe. Is a copycat psycho killer trying to create his own real life slasher film? The truth turns out to be more horrifying than fiction.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: A House in the Woods
programme.desc: Lisa Carlson is found murdered in her own home. It seems robbers surprised her during a moment of sexual self-satisfaction and killed her on the spot.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighbors on a Dead End
programme.desc: A disabled fireman appoints himself sheriff of his street, policing his neighbors and clamping down on violations ranging from loud music to off leash dogs. Things boil over at a birthday party where shots are fired and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bang Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A couple who trades the city for the country soon find themselves in conflict with the gun shop owners across the street. Mutual video cameras record threats, fights and growing hostilities that finally lead to shots fired and blood spilled.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Absent Teacher
programme.desc: In 1993, an elementary school teacher goes missing after her first day at a new job. Over the next two months, investigators sift through clues, piecing together the heartbreaking truth behind the young educator's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: The Perfect Suspect
programme.desc: Between1993 and 1996, the rape and murder of three Arkansas women put local detectives on the trail of a sadistic killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Mother's Day Murders
programme.desc: In 1985, a young military wife and two of her three little girls were viciously murdered in their home.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Barefoot Homicide
programme.desc: After an all-night study session in a university lab, math student Deborah Wilson is found strangled, missing her shoes and socks. Years later, Philadelphia investigators unearth the shocking obsession that drove a killer to take her life.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Holy Terror
programme.desc: Gunshots rip through the icy Idaho air, leaving a young woman gunned down in her doorway. Left behind: shell casings and a trail of footprints in the snow. Police must piece together the clues to catch the shooter in this coldest of crimes.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Permanent Frost
programme.desc: On a wintery December evening, a 29 year old supermom doesn't return home after her meeting. Is she going to miss her daughter's first Christmas? Her family is devastated when the devoted mother is found frozen solid and dumped in the snow.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
