programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fripp Island Fix-Up
programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New York
programme.desc: We're in New York City for a tour of the town's best eats. From Velselka's borscht in the East Village to smoked herring on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA

programme.title: Movie: Ford V. Ferrari

programme.title: Movie: The Fountain

programme.title: Shameless: You Sold Me the Laundromat, Remember?

programme.title: Shameless: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Monica is back, and her first task is to help Debbie get back Franny. Meanwhile, Frank tries to avoid her, Ian has his first fight with Trevor, Lip tries to mask his relapsing alcoholism and Fiona's laundromat gets a bad review.

programme.title: Shameless: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Fiona, facing mounting issues, contemplates Margo's offer to buy the laundromat. Meanwhile, Ian tries to deal with the fact that Mickey might be out of prison and Kev and V take matters into their own hands after Svetlana's betrayal.

programme.title: Shameless: Happily Ever After
programme.desc: Frank and Monica have an interesting proposal for the kids. Lip buckles under pressure from Debbie to get his sobriety under control. Meanwhile, Fiona sees a business opportunity as Kev and V attempt to start a new chapter.

programme.title: Shameless: Requiem for a Slut
programme.desc: The Gallaghers grapple with the loss of one of their own. As Lip takes steps to improve his future, Debbie, Carl and Liam get roped into Frank's new scheme. Meanwhile, Kev and V get their revenge on Svetlana.

programme.title: Movie: The Humanity Bureau

programme.title: Movie: Urban Cowboy

programme.title: Shameless: We Become What We ... Frank!

programme.title: Shameless: Where's My Meth?
programme.desc: Frank re-lives his 20s and joins the workforce for the first time. Meanwhile, Fiona grapples with evicting someone from her building. Lip works out a plan to sabotage Charlie's chances with Sierra. Ian and Carl make a troubling discovery about Monica.

programme.title: Shameless: God Bless Her Rotting Soul
programme.desc: A violent meth dealer threatens the Gallaghers, forcing Ian, Carl, Lip and Debbie to find a way to pay him off without involving Fiona. In the meantime, Fiona battles it out with a vindictive tenant. Lip cares for a down-and-out Professor Youens.

programme.title: Shameless: F**k Paying It Forward

programme.title: Shameless: The (Mis)Education of Liam Fergus Beircheart Gallagher

programme.title: Shameless: Icarus Fell and Rusty Ate Him

programme.title: Shameless: Occupy Fiona

programme.title: Movie: The Preacher's Wife
programme.desc: When the angel Dudley is sent by God to help Reverend Henry Biggs, who is struggling with his marriage and dealing with threats from a developer, he finds himself falling in love with the reverend's wife.

programme.title: Movie: Deck the Halls
programme.desc: Buddy Hall and Steve Finch are two feuding neighbours, who try to prove to the other that they have more Holiday spirit by overly decorating their houses.

programme.title: Movie: Prancer Returns
programme.desc: A boy's care and concern for an orphaned reindeer brings his town and family together.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way II
programme.desc: When Larry learns that his daughter badly wants a talking bear for Christmas, he's determined to get it for her. Unfortunately, his ex-wife's new husband wants to be the hero of the day, and the two battle it out to get their hands on the in-demand toy.

programme.title: Movie: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: A nasty creature plans to steal Christmas from the residents of Whoville, who love Christmas, until a small child named Cindy Lou Who decides to befriend him. A fun-filled remake of the classic cartoon and Dr. Seuss favourite.

programme.title: Bones: The Method to the Madness
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the death of a woman whose body was found mutilated and discarded in a city garbage can.

programme.title: Bones: The Patriot in Purgatory
programme.desc: While investigating the remains of bodies that have been deemed unidentifiable, five 'squinterns' uncover the identity of a man who died as a result of the 9-11 terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Bones: The Bod in the Pod
programme.desc: The team tackles one of their most challenging investigations when remains are found washed up on a beach in a seemingly impenetrable pod.

programme.title: Bones: The But in the Joke
programme.desc: A street artist, who is covertly plastering his art on a billboard, falls and lands directly into his own glue and into human remains. So the team must figure out the identity of the remains.

programme.title: Movie: Solo: A Star Wars Story

programme.title: Movie: Solo: A Star Wars Story

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: Two Jedi Knights on a mission to help a queen save her world discover a slave boy that one believes is destined to bring balance to the force.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
programme.desc: Luke Skywalker and his allies set out to rescue Princess Leia from the Galactic Empire.

programme.title: Movie: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family (Clark, Ellen and their two children, Rusty and Audrey) set out to take a road trip across the country to vacation at Walley World. Unfortunately nothing goes as Clark had planned and the family finds themselves in bad situations.

programme.title: Movie: Groundhog Day

programme.title: Movie: Scrooged
programme.desc: A callous executive learns the true meaning of Christmas when he is visited by ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: Scrooged

programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: Pinocchio's Christmas

programme.title: Nestor, the Long-Eared Christmas Donkey

programme.title: The Legend of Frosty The Snowman

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.desc: A woman is planning the town's Christmas celebration and must win over a firefighter in order to obtain his beautiful spruce for the tree lighting.

programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Love You Like Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Christmas List

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Bell Bride
programme.desc: A wedding planner heads off to Alaska to source a rare flower for a bride. While there, she is charmed by a handsome botanist who shows her what the town has to offer for the holidays.

programme.desc: A career-driven woman returns to her hometown for the holidays and faces her high-school boyfriend. Together, they rediscover what matters most in life.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Good Morning Christmas!

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Inn
programme.desc: About to score a big promotion, a woman's life turns upside-down when she inherits an inn in Alaska from her aunt.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Secret Santa
programme.desc: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman moves back into the house she grew up in, brining back memories of the boy next door who recently passed away. One day she receives a Christmas card from a secret admirer she believes to be the same boy.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Hotel
programme.desc: Returning to her hometown to open a hotel for Christmas, a young woman finds her childhood friend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Breaking the Piggy Bank
programme.desc: Tony gambles on a hidden strip of paydirt. Parker's crew works overtime to run both wash plants in hope of a big payoff. Rick scrambles to keep is small crew running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: It's Alive
programme.desc: Rick bets nearly all his gold on a new machine that could transform his operation. Tony resurrects an abandoned secret weapon. Parker hires new crew members to make up for lost time.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Big Red vs. Sluicifer
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Parker's teams fall into a competition while Fred's veteran crew faces an unexpected setback. Tony finds lost gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Moving Heaven and Earth
programme.desc: Tony mobilizes an arsenal to cash in on lost gold. Fred's veteran crew fight old equipment. Rick risks his season on a hunch. Dustin breaks out the mammoth claw while Fred baptizes a greenhorn. The Dirt talks with Rick, Mitch, Dustin and Carlos.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender

programme.title: Gold Rush: Moving Heaven and Earth
programme.desc: Tony mobilizes an arsenal to cash in on lost gold. Fred's veteran crew fight old equipment. Rick risks his season on a hunch. Dustin breaks out the mammoth claw while Fred baptizes a greenhorn. The Dirt talks with Rick, Mitch, Dustin and Carlos.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi's Cursed Quest

programme.title: Expedition X: Ghosts in the Swamp

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hard Times Make the Best Shine

programme.title: Moonshiners: Interstate Alliance

programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Killers
programme.desc: After returning home from their honeymoon, newlyweds discover that their new neighbours are assassins hired to kill them.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Sweatsuit Charades and Donuts Holes

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Big Facts and Tiny Hands
programme.desc: Raven-Symoné and Miranda Pearman-Maday, Terry Bradshaw and Rachel Bradshaw and Jamie Chung and Bryan Greenburg compete remotely from their own homes in a night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Booty Shakes and Whipped Cream
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne and Jack Osbourne, Loni Love and James Welsh, and Erin Andrews and Jarret Stoll compete remotely from their homes in a night of fun and games.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and his wife Eniko, along with couples Terry and Rebecca Crews, Sarah Hyland and her fiancé Wells Adams and Joel and Sarah McHale take part in a game night that viewers can take part in from home. The couples will be awarded money for charity.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Top Chef
programme.desc: Terry and Tammy attempt one last time to try and convince Lacey and Noah to move to Texas by offering to buy them a restaurant. Meanwhile, Rachel introduces her new guy to the family by pulling a major prank on Terry.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Problems
programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry Is in a Jam
programme.desc: The Bradshaw clan travels to Dallas as Terry is hosting (and driving in) the big Monster Jam truck rally. When Terry suffers from a panic attack, an old sibling rivalry is forced to come to a head.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Rachel is with the wrong guy and everyone in the family can see it but her. While Terry and Zurie get payback on Tammy after years of her pranks, Lacey and Noah consider moving back to Texas to be closer to family.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Terry is invited to Washington D.C. to sing with Rob Gronkowski at the USO. While he brings his family along to meet the troops, Rachel gets her mojo back and falls for a marine.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy
programme.desc: As the Coronavirus pandemic grips the nation, Terry invites the family to hunker down with him at the ranch, driving everyone crazy.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Man Problems
programme.desc: Terry and the girls get involved in Rachel’s love life, resulting in a competition to find her Mr. Right. The family tries to talk Terry out of agreeing to be a potential spokesperson for a certain product.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Fit For The Fastlane
programme.desc: Terry prepares to announce at a NASCAR race, which will be his first public appearance since the pandemic started. Wanting to look his best, he tries getting back into shape while trying to convince Rachel to sing at the speedway.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Oui Oui Terr-y
programme.desc: Tammy grows suspicious of Terry’s romantic anniversary surprise trip to Paris. Meanwhile, Zurie joins in on the Bradshaw family tradition and finds her passion for showing horses.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Legends

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicago's Finest
programme.desc: Guy takes a tour of the Windy City, exploring the flavours of Chicago. He tastes everything from twists on burgers to old-school diner classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Biscuits, Bagels and BLTs
programme.desc: A breakfast joint in Portland where they make Buttermilk pancakes with sweet potato, and a diner in Anselmo, California that makes a BLT with soft-shelled Crab.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Twists
programme.desc: Guy visits unique comfort food places, such as the dog-friendly neighbourhood joint that serves the Barking Lard BLT.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: America's Favorites: Fantastic Flavortown Finds
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and son Hunter find more lucky winners to grab $1,000 and a spot on DDD. On this trip, there's monster meatballs and tostadas in Florida, pit beef in Baltimore and sentimental stories from these trying times all over the Triple D Nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up
programme.desc: A Chicago brewhouse serves up beer to go with mussels, a brisket sandwich and headcheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Massachusetts Madness

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense

programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Christmas Story

programme.title: River Monsters: South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: In Fiji, people are coming under attack from unseen assailants in the water, but it's not clear if there are multiple culprits or a single persistent perpetrator. Jeremy Wade battles tropical storms and thick jungle in an all-out search for a culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the real creature behind the enduring legend of the sea serpent -- starting with a violent attack in the English Channel and culminating in the dark depths of the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: For years fishermen have been vanishing in Alaska's remote and unforgiving wilderness, their deaths unseen, their bodies never found. For freshwater detective Jeremy Wade, a recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: An extreme angler is on the trail of a monster that leads him to the site of the worst nuclear accident in history, Chernobyl.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: The Freshwater Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to encounter a Far Eastern predator, the Snakehead, now wreaking havoc in America's backyard. In Australia, Wade is in search of the rare Northern River Shark.

programme.title: Big Cat Tales: Kingdom of Predators
programme.desc: A dispersed Marsh Pride faces weakened protection from the six male warrior lions. Kabibi and Cloudy Eye desperately hunt to sustain their hungry new cubs. Amani the cheetah works hard to raise three new cubs.

programme.title: River Monsters: Russian Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Russia's remote Amur River, where the mysterious deaths of three men appear to be linked with a reclusive freshwater giant.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: The Freshwater Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to encounter a Far Eastern predator, the Snakehead, now wreaking havoc in America's backyard. In Australia, Wade is in search of the rare Northern River Shark.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of the toughest and most baffling cases of his career.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Saving Daisy
programme.desc: A team races to save a wombat named Daisy suffering from mysterious health issues before it's too late. Keepers Georgie and Luke venture on a challenging road trip to transport a giraffe calf, and a secret hidden underneath the Melbourne Zoo is revealed.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Moving Day Dilemma

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Surgery in the Savannah
programme.desc: In the savannah, Dr. Bonnie must perform a critical surgery on zebra Zaide's badly damaged tail. Tiger Indrah gets an incredible tenth birthday surprise, and Dr. Sarah is determined to solve spider monkey Isobella's medical mystery.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Navigating a New Normal
programme.desc: In order to navigate the COVID-19 global pandemic, the staff must ensure proper care for their animals. Keepers spring into action when urgent dental surgery is needed for elderly tiger Binjai, and a family of cotton top tamarin monkeys must be relocated.

programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Trade Secrets: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Brian and Mika work to keep the stress level low when Virginia empty nesters decide to build a house in Florida. She wants colour everywhere while he's imagining a white oasis, leaving Mika to find a compromise to create a home they can both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Virginia Beach Forever
programme.desc: After serving in the U.S. Air Force for six years, a couple decides to leave Arizona and find their dream home in the military-friendly town of Virginia Beach, Virginia. A life-changing $100,000 settlement is used for a down payment.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Tallahassee Dream Team
programme.desc: Shane buys scratchers almost every day, and luckily for him and his partner, Crystal, his habit paid off to the tune of $1 million! Now they're able to buy their first house in Tallahassee, Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: 500,000 Reasons to Party
programme.desc: A Wisconsin mom is ready to ditch her tiny apartment after winning $500,000 on a scratch off. Now that her kids have left the nest, this house hunt is all about her and she asks David Bromstad to find a home with space to entertain friends and family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Lottery Queen
programme.desc: An avid gambler won $500,000 on the Illinois lottery and is ready to hunt for a townhouse with David Bromstad. She wants a fixer-upper so she can put her own stamp on the home, but David may persuade her to buy a fully renovated property.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mountain High Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida couple receives an inheritance from a long-lost relative that leaves them $900,000 richer. They struggle to agree on a budget for a mountain vacation home in Blue Ridge, GA, so David Bromstad steps in to help them find something they both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Slice of New Jersey Paradise
programme.desc: A former police officer couple manifested a better life for themselves and their five kids when they won the lottery in Bergen County, NJ. They call on David Bromstad to find a property that fits their large family and meets their sky-high expectations.

programme.title: Biggest Little Christmas Showdown: A Tiny Dickens Christmas
programme.desc: Actor James Monroe Iglehart hosts as three teams of the nation's top designers and renovators create unbelievable Charles Dickens Christmas-themed masterpieces from scratch. The team that impresses the judges most moves on to the next round.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Winter Is Coming

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: New Year, New Garden

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: As Night Fell

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Angel's Landing was a community of free-spirits with Lou Castro at its center. Investigators were suspicious of the mysterious deaths happening there. Now, commune members have courageously decided to tell their stories in hopes of helping others.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Motive
programme.desc: He was a force on the football field. Then, the charming athlete was shot. His killer left few clues and the case sat cold until someone spilled a secret. What police asked the tipster to do next would make her a target. How much would she risk?

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Massacre
programme.desc: The Ortega family’s annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower, opens fire. Detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Morning Murder
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is murdered during what looks like a brutal home invasion. Police learn the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Holiday Terror
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Devil's Bathtub
programme.desc: Craig and Laura Rideout appeared happy but, after a contentious separation revealed an ugly secret, one of them would soon be dead. Clues pointed to four possible killers and left investigators wondering if this murder was all in the family.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Pharmacist
programme.desc: Deception and greed drive a local pharmacist in Kansas City down an evil path, affecting the lives of thousands of helpless and trusting cancer patients who believe they're getting life-saving treatment.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: License to Kill: Drug Dealing Doctor
programme.desc: The small city of Russellville, Arkansas normally experienced very few drug overdose deaths each year. But in 2000, that number unexpectedly began to skyrocket.

programme.title: Dateline: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant, but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on the sensational trial of Martin MacNeill, the Utah doctor accused of drugging and drowning his wife in their bathtub.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Suhs

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rogers

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Mourning
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.desc: Graham trades quips with Mariah Carey, Nadiya Hussain, Tim Peake, Richard Osman, and Gary Barlow.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: Vampire death dealer Selene continues her struggle against the Lycans and Vampires that took everything from her. When she discovers the two factions are hunting her blood to become more powerful, she works to end the eternal war once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Evolution
programme.desc: A werewolf and a vampire, forbidden lovers, attempt to unlock the secret behind their tribes' feud.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Rise of the Lycans
programme.desc: Lucian, a young Lycan, becomes a powerful leader among the slave Lycans. He plans a rebellion against the vampires' rule with the support of his secret lover and vampire, Sonja.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Hitler's Final Days
programme.desc: From the D-Day landings on June 6, 1944, to the surrender of the Third Reich on May 8 1945, it took 336 days to bring down the Nazi regime. Explore the 11 months preceding Hitler's defeat and learn entire chapters of the war previously untold.

programme.title: Chain of Command: Fighting ISIS
programme.desc: On the front lines in the battle for Mosul in Iraq.

programme.title: Beltway Snipers: The Final Report
programme.desc: Go inside the D.C. sniper case, meet a victim 15 years later, and hear from one of the shooters.

programme.title: Unabomber: The Secret History
programme.desc: Surprising truths about the unconventional killer, Ted Kaczynski.

programme.title: The Skyjacker That Got Away
programme.desc: In 1971, a hijacker, named Dan Cooper, parachuted from a plane with a request of $200,000, crafting the FBI's only unsolved hijacking case. With help of modern forensics, experts hope DNA analysis will solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Real Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie and Clyde's epic 11-state crime spree that included armed robbery, car theft, abduction, murder and a series of violent gun battles are revealed. Experts, family members, gang members and FBI files reveal the truth behind the drama.

programme.desc: Relive the personal mafia stories from the men and women who lived in this perilous underworld.

programme.title: The Hunt for Lincoln's Assassin
programme.desc: On April 14, 1865, Abraham Lincoln becomes the first American president to be assassinated. And in the same instant his murderer, one of the most famous stage actors across the country, becomes the most wanted man in the young nation's history.

programme.title: Lincoln's Secret Killer?
programme.desc: Discover if Abraham Lincoln was dying of cancer when he was killed. Travel to the front lines as scientists attempt to solve a genetic mystery using a piece of fabric stained with the former president's blood to run DNA analysis.

programme.title: America Before Columbus
programme.desc: Scientific evidence shows that when Columbus stepped ashore in 1492, millions of people were already living in the New World. Over the next 100 years, entire civilizations were wiped out when ships came over with plants, animals and disease.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: The Lost Tomb of Alexander the Great
programme.desc: Archaeologist Pepi Papakosta is on a hunt for Alexander the Great's lost tomb.

programme.title: Atlas of Cursed Places: The Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: With the help of emerging science, Sam dives deep into the curse of the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Shelter from the Storm
programme.desc: Alaskans learn new survival skills as winter loses its grip on the Arctic landscape.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: False Start
programme.desc: In the final days of winter, Alaskans use their time to prepare for what lies ahead.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Homecoming
programme.desc: As the ice and snow melt across the Arctic, Alaskans take advantage of the warm season.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: New Territory
programme.desc: Twenty four hour daylight in the spring allows Alaskans to work nonstop to prepare for winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: To survive winter in Alaska, its residents brave life-threatening challenges every day.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Best-Laid Plans
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, Alaskans must endure the brutal elements with no end in sight.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation: Alaskan Built
programme.desc: In order to endure dark winter, the next generation must roam Alaska’s great expanse.

programme.title: Wildlife Below Zero
programme.desc: Animals around the world struggle to survive the harshest season on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet’s rarest and most spectacular creatures and harbours some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Follow a year in the Taiga Forest, a frozen forest containing one third of the world's tree that spans right around the globe: across North America, Scandinavia, and extending across Siberia to the shores of the Pacific, sheltering majestic animals.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering 1/5th of the earth's surface, the arctic tundra is one of the coldest and driest places on the planet. The piercing sub-zero temperatures and powerful winds of the arctic tundra challenges even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: How It's Made: Ceramic Fireplaces, Synthetic Corks, Parking Garage Floor Slabs
programme.desc: See how ceramic fireplaces, synthetic corks and parking garage floor slabs are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Manufacturing High Performance Lubricants
programme.desc: Manufacturing fascinates George Davison, but keeping the machines that produce items running in good repair takes special care. George sends Darieth Chisolm to Dallas to learn about high-tech manufacturing lubrication.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Single mom Tracy is starting to turn her life around when she falls for attentive Jody. As his jealousy starts to overtake their relationship, she soon comes to realize she can run, but she can't hide.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Watcher
programme.desc: On a rare day off from work, single mom Carrie Caudill and a friend embark on a well-deserved girl's night out. But out of nowhere, an unexpected confrontation puts Carrie on a dangerous collision course with a calculating and sadistic madman.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Footprints
programme.desc: When cops arrive at a snow-covered home in Chestnut Ridge, New York, they discover a young woman has been murdered. They are left to wonder if a set of footprints in the snow belong to their killer, and why there is only one set when there should be two.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Footprints
programme.desc: When cops arrive at a snow-covered home in Chestnut Ridge, New York, they discover a young woman has been murdered. They are left to wonder if a set of footprints in the snow belong to their killer, and why there is only one set when there should be two.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: BTK announces his arrival by murdering four members of the same family. He claims more victims over several years while taunting police, then goes dark for two decades before resurfacing in 2004 after media stories claim that he'd been forgotten.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: A new generation of law enforcement hunts the resurgent BTK, who delights in communicating with police and the media about his murders while threatening new ones. He is finally arrested, bringing relief to Wichita but shock and horror to his family.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 3
programme.desc: Dennis Rader, aka BTK, confesses to ten murders and points police to the disturbing hoard of evidence against him. The depth of his depravity is revealed, along with the lasting effect he had on those in his orbit, most especially his own daughter.

programme.title: McMartin Preschool Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When the parents of children in a California preschool are informed that their kids may have been the victims of sexual abuse, it sets off a chain of panic and catastrophic events that will put an innocent man on trial for the heinous crimes.

programme.title: Andrea Yates: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: Andrea Yates appears to have the perfect family. But when her fascination with extreme religious ideas and hidden postpartum psychosis lead her to believe Satan is sending messages, she drowns all five of her children, and a media firestorm ensues.

programme.title: Atlanta Olympic Bombing: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: At the 1996 Olympics, a security guard discovers pipe bombs and clears the area to minimize fatalities. Praised as a hero, the FBI then decides he fits the profile of a domestic terrorist, while the real villain continues his terror campaign.

programme.title: The Witmans
programme.desc: In 1998, Zachary Witman, 15, found his brother Greg, 13, brutally stabbed to death in their sleepy suburban home. Zachary was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole, sending his parents on a 20-year odyssey to free their son.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Crime and Injustice
programme.desc: The murder of a 19-year-old college student marks the beginning of one of the most tormenting investigations in US history, one that forced everyone involved to question the meaning of the word justice.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Bridge to Freedom
programme.desc: Nicholas Johnson was a teen robber who terrorized the streets of Portland, Oregon, but after getting caught, he planed an elaborate escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Brother
programme.desc: Mark and Maverick Maher were punks who formed their own militia with a band of youths who robbed houses and broke into cars.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Take Down My Ex-Boyfriend
programme.desc: Donna Schatz went on the run after carrying out a violent vendetta on her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.desc: It's Herman's first school dance and the gang tries to teach him the ropes, but Herman ends up teaching them instead. Meanwhile, Uncle Will's mom is famous for her gigantic turkeys. Will invites a guest over a feast he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Moustached Kid
programme.desc: When a new kid shows up at school sporting a moustache, all the girls want to date him and all the boys are jealous of him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Allowance Drama
programme.desc: Hilarity continues when Uncle Will and the kids bring a Loch Ness Pool Monster to life and stage a fake game show 'Date My Mom!' to prank a contestant with a series of gross and wild challenges.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Float Like a Butterfly, Sting Like a Flea
programme.desc: Herman accidentally draws the ire of a bully at school and prepares for the worst.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Herman Gets Shredded
programme.desc: The entire student body fails a physical fitness test after Herman's low score brings the school's average to the lowest total in history.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Welcome to Walk the Prank
programme.desc: Follow four kids' antics at school and at home, which provide a source of inspiration for their pranks.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Death of a Lima Bean
programme.desc: Herman is devastated when he accidentally kills the lima bean he had been cultivating as a class project and begins to worry about his own safety.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Whatever Gets You Through the Night
programme.desc: Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: My Dad is Cooler Than Your Dad
programme.desc: After Herman and Goofus get called into the principal's office, Alex Baldwin and Coach Jeacher compete to see which one of them is the coolest dad.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Invasion! The New King!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Spying for the Big Guy!
programme.desc: One of Team Rocket’s questionable claims comes back to haunt them when they’re paid a visit by Giovanni’s assistant Matori!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb want to show Santa how grateful they are for the work that he does every year at Christmas time by transforming the city of Danville into a giant shimmering thank you card and building a rest stop for Santa to relax in.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Phineas and Ferb Family Christmas
programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'
